# Switch to Tailwind

## Context
Custom utility needs outgrew Bootstrap. Team is comfortable with utility-first CSS now.

## Decision
Migrate to Tailwind CSS over the next sprint.

## Consequences
**Enables:** finer styling control.
**Trade-offs:** larger learning curve for new contributors.
